data.name: ksNoEntrySelected
data.comment: Placeholder shown in the Avalonia lexical-edit surface when no record is selected.

data.name: ksEntryTypeUnsupported
data.value: The new lexical edit view is currently available only for lexical entry records. Other record types use the classic view.
data.comment: Shown when the Avalonia lexical-edit surface is asked to display a non-LexEntry record.

data.name: ksUnsupportedEditor
data.value: (this field type is not supported in the new view yet)
data.comment: Shown in place of a field whose editor has no Avalonia renderer.

data.name: ksEmbeddedObjectReadOnly
data.value: This text contains formatting that cannot be edited in this view and is read-only here. Use the classic view to edit it.
data.comment: Tooltip on a read-only text row whose value carries content the new editor would corrupt on edit: an embedded object (ORC), or a run property (e.g. colour, offset, superscript) the new editor does not round-trip. Editing stays available in the classic view.

data.name: ksAudioRecordingReadOnly
data.value: (audio recording — play or record it in the classic view)
data.comment: Placeholder shown in a read-only text row for a voice/audio (IsVoice) writing system: the new view cannot yet play or record audio, so the row is read-only and the data stays visible/diagnosable rather than a blank editable box that would corrupt the recording on edit.

data.name: ksSave
data.comment: Commit button of the Avalonia lexical-edit region editor.

data.name: ksCancel
data.comment: Cancel button of the Avalonia lexical-edit region editor.

data.name: ksUndoEditEntry
data.comment: Undo label for the fenced lexical-edit session; appears in the Edit menu.

data.name: ksRedoEditEntry
data.comment: Redo label for the fenced lexical-edit session; appears in the Edit menu.

data.name: ksUndoChangeToFormat
data.comment: Field-specific undo label for the fenced lexical-edit session when a single field's edit opened it; {0} is the field label (e.g. "Undo change to Gloss"). Mirrors the legacy DetailControls ksUndoChangeTo wording.

data.name: ksRedoChangeToFormat
data.comment: Field-specific redo label for the fenced lexical-edit session; {0} is the field label (e.g. "Redo change to Gloss"). Mirrors the legacy DetailControls ksRedoChangeTo wording.

data.name: ksLexemeFormRequired
data.value: A Lexeme Form (or Citation Form) is required.
data.comment: Validation message when an entry would be saved without any lexeme/citation form text.

data.name: ksEditDiscardedInvalid
data.comment: Warning shown when navigating away from (or closing) an entry whose pending edit fails validation; the invalid edit is rolled back rather than silently lost. {0} is the validation reason(s), one per line.

data.name: ksEditDiscardedInvalidTitle
data.comment: Title of the warning shown when a pending lexical edit was rolled back on navigate because it failed validation.

data.name: ksLexicalEditRegionName
data.comment: Screen-reader name of the Avalonia lexical-edit region surface.

data.name: ksAvaloniaHostName
data.comment: Screen-reader name of the WinForms control hosting the Avalonia surface.

data.name: ksGhostAddPrompt
data.comment: Ghost add-prompt line shown for an empty field section; {0} is the field label.

data.name: ksCopy
data.comment: Context-menu command copying a field's text.

data.name: ksAddSelected
data.comment: Confirm button of the multi-select reference-vector add picker; commits all checked items in one step.

data.name: ksChorusAddNote
data.comment: Add-note affordance of the Chorus Send/Receive notes bar (D2).

data.name: ksChorusAddMessage
data.comment: Watermark of the append-message editor in a Chorus note's flyout.

data.name: ksChorusOk
data.comment: Confirm button of the Chorus notes flyouts.

data.name: ksChorusResolved
data.comment: Resolve (close/reopen) toggle of a Chorus note's flyout.

data.name: ksLaunchDialog
data.comment: Accessible name of the "..." dialog-launcher button on a launcher row (D4).

data.name: ksLauncherUnavailable
data.value: This field is edited in a dialog that is not available in this view.
data.comment: Tooltip of the disabled launcher button when the host provides no dialog service (D4).

data.name: ksFieldSettings
data.comment: Accessible name of the hover-revealed settings gear on a chooser field; {0} is the field label (e.g. "Morph Type settings").

data.name: ksEditListFormat
data.comment: Tooltip/label of a configure gear whose list-editor jump was derived from the row's possibility list; {0} is the list name (mirrors the legacy chooser's "Edit the … list" links).

data.name: ksLexemeFormLabel
data.comment: Label of the lexeme-form row in the first-slice entry view (compiled label override and authored fallback).

data.name: ksMorphTypeLabel
data.comment: Label of the morph-type row in the first-slice entry view (authored fallback).

data.name: ksGlossLabel
data.comment: Label of the gloss row in the first-slice entry view (authored fallback).

data.name: ksFieldOptionsMenu
data.comment: Accessible name and tooltip of the hover-revealed "⋮" (vertical ellipsis) button on a field row that opens the field's options menu (Field Visibility / Move Field / Help).

data.name: ksCharacterStyle
data.comment: Accessible name and tooltip of the character-style picker affordance on an editable text row; opens the list of the project's character styles to apply to the current selection.

data.name: ksDefaultCharacterStyle
data.comment: The leading entry of the character-style picker; selecting it clears any named character style on the current selection, reverting it to the paragraph's default.

data.name: ksWritingSystem
data.comment: Accessible name and tooltip of the writing-system picker affordance on an editable text row (Phase 4): opens the list of the project's writing systems to retag the current selection.

data.name: ksAddParagraph
data.comment: Accessible name and tooltip of the per-paragraph "add paragraph" affordance in an editable structured-text (StText) field.

data.name: ksDeleteParagraph
data.comment: Accessible name and tooltip of the per-paragraph "delete paragraph" affordance in an editable structured-text (StText) field.

data.name: ksParagraphStyle
data.comment: Accessible name and tooltip of the per-paragraph style picker in an editable structured-text (StText) field; opens the list of the project's paragraph styles to apply to this paragraph.

data.name: ksDefaultParagraphStyle
data.comment: The leading entry of the paragraph-style picker; selecting it clears any named paragraph style on the paragraph, reverting it to the default.

data.name: ksSelectAllRows
data.comment: Accessible name for the browse table's check-all checkbox column.

data.name: ksConfigureColumnsMenu
data.comment: Browse header context-menu entry that opens the Configure Columns dialog.

data.name: ksFilterShowAll
data.comment: Browse filter-row preset that clears a column's blank-aware filter (mirrors the legacy FilterBar "Show All").

data.name: ksFilterBlanks
data.comment: Browse filter-row preset narrowing a column to rows whose cell is blank.

data.name: ksFilterNonBlanks
data.comment: Browse filter-row preset narrowing a column to rows whose cell is non-blank.

data.name: ksBulkEditListChoice
data.comment: Bulk-edit bar tab: set a list/possibility reference (e.g. Morph Type) across the checked rows.

data.name: ksBulkEditTarget
data.comment: Bulk-edit bar label for the target-column dropdown.

data.name: ksBulkEditPreview
data.comment: Bulk-edit bar button: preview the chosen value across the checked rows without changing data.

data.name: ksBulkEditApply
data.comment: Bulk-edit bar button: apply the chosen value across the checked rows as one undoable change.

data.name: ksBulkEditBarName
data.comment: Accessible name of the bulk-edit bar panel.

data.name: ksBulkCopyTab
data.comment: Bulk-edit bar tab: copy one column's text into another across the checked rows.

data.name: ksBulkCopySource
data.comment: Bulk Copy tab label for the source-column dropdown (the column whose text is copied from).

data.name: ksBulkCopyAppend
data.comment: Bulk Copy mode: append the source to a non-empty target (with a separator), else set it directly.

data.name: ksBulkCopyReplace
data.comment: Bulk Copy mode: the source overwrites the target unconditionally.

data.name: ksBulkCopyDoNothing
data.comment: Bulk Copy mode: only fill empty targets; leave targets that already have text untouched.

data.name: ksBulkClearTab
data.comment: Bulk-edit bar tab: empty a target text column (e.g. Lexeme Form) across the checked rows.

data.name: ksBulkReplaceTab
data.comment: Bulk-edit bar tab: run a find/replace over a target text column across the checked rows.

data.name: ksBulkReplaceSetup
data.comment: Bulk Replace tab button: opens the Find/Replace pattern dialog to configure the replace.

data.name: ksBulkReplaceNoPattern
data.comment: Bulk Replace summary placeholder shown before the user configures a find/replace pattern.

data.name: ksBrowseSortFromEnd
data.comment: Browse header context-menu toggle: suffix-oriented sort on the reversed text of the column.

data.name: ksBrowseSortByLength
data.comment: Browse header context-menu toggle (shown only for columns whose spec allows it): sort by cell length.

data.name: ksBrowseFilterMoreThanOneLine
data.comment: Browse filter-row preset for multi-paragraph columns: rows whose cell spans more than one line.

data.name: ksBrowseFilterExactlyOneLine
data.comment: Browse filter-row preset for multi-paragraph columns: rows whose cell is exactly one (non-empty) line.

data.name: ksBrowseFilterYes
data.comment: Browse filter-row preset (exact match) for Yes/No columns.

data.name: ksBrowseFilterNo
data.comment: Browse filter-row preset (exact match) for Yes/No columns.

data.name: ksBrowseFilterZero
data.comment: Browse filter-row preset for integer columns: rows whose value is exactly zero.

data.name: ksBrowseFilterGreaterThanZero
data.comment: Browse filter-row preset for integer columns: rows whose value is greater than zero.

data.name: ksBrowseFilterGreaterThanOne
data.comment: Browse filter-row preset for integer columns: rows whose value is greater than one.
